parameters.query: SELECT session_id, coleta_step FROM trial_feedback WHERE session_id = $1;

assignments.name: opening_message
assignments.value: Me manda um número de 0 a 10 🙂

parameters.query: UPDATE trial_feedback SET nps=$2, last_user_message_at=now(), last_user_message=$2::text, coleta_step='q2' WHERE session_id=$1;

assignments.name: opening_message
assignments.value: Legal! O que você MAIS gostou na aula/professor? Pode ser em 1 frase.

parameters.query: UPDATE trial_feedback SET resume_url = $2, last_bot_message_at = now() WHERE session_id = $1;

UPDATE trial_feedback SET sugestao = COALESCE(sugestao,'') || CASE WHEN COALESCE(sugestao,'')='' THEN '' ELSE E'\n' END || $2, last_user_message_at=now(), last_user_message=$2, coleta_step='q3' WHERE session_id=$1;

assignments.name: opening_message
assignments.value: Show! E o que PODERIA melhorar? (1 frase)

parameters.query: UPDATE trial_feedback SET resume_url = $2, last_bot_message_at = now() WHERE session_id = $1;

UPDATE trial_feedback SET sugestao = COALESCE(sugestao,'') || CASE WHEN COALESCE(sugestao,'')='' THEN '' ELSE E'\n' END || '[Melhoria] '|| $2, last_user_message_at=now(), last_user_message=$2, coleta_step='q4' WHERE session_id=$1;

assignments.name: opening_message
assignments.value: Quer que eu já te ajude com a MATRÍCULA agora? (responda: sim ou não)

parameters.query: UPDATE trial_feedback SET resume_url = $2, last_bot_message_at = now() WHERE session_id = $1;
UPDATE trial_feedback SET resume_url = $2, last_bot_message_at = now() WHERE session_id = $1;
UPDATE trial_feedback SET intent_matricula=$2, status_coleta='completo', last_user_message_at=now(), last_user_message=CASE WHEN $2 THEN 'sim' ELSE 'não' END WHERE session_id=$1;

assignments.name: opening_message
assignments.value: Obrigado pelo feedback! Se precisar de algo, é só me chamar. 👋
